standard: Đang ở Trà Ôn đây này, mà có trồng đâu mà ăn chứ
A: I'm right here in Trà Ôn, but they don't grow anything to eat.
B: I'm here in Tra On, but I didn't plant anything to eat.
C: I'm in Tra On right now, but there's nothing planted here to eat anyway.

standard: Góc này ở số 7 Bacu này , chiều mà uống một ly trà mát lắm!
A: This corner at 7 Bacu Street is perfect for a refreshing cup of tea in the afternoon!
B: This corner is at 7 Bacu; having a glass of tea here in the afternoon is very refreshing!
C: This spot is at number 7 Bacu—it's so refreshing to drink a glass of tea here in the afternoon!

standard: Ừ bạn, sắp tới còn to hơn nữa, chứ thế này sao ăn thua gì, cố gắng bằng vợ chồng bạn thôi.
A: Yeah, it's going to get even bigger soon, this is nothing compared to what you and your wife have achieved. We'll just try to be as good as you and your wife.
B: Yes, it will be even bigger soon; this is nothing compared to that. I'll try to be as good as you and your spouse.
C: Yeah, my friend, it's going to get even bigger soon, but right now it doesn't really make much difference. I'm just trying to keep up with you and your spouse.

standard: Về ôn thi ấy chị, mà lịch buồn cười lắm, thi một môn xong nghỉ 11 ngày, rồi thi tiếp một môn nghỉ tiếp 8 ngày, mà 6 môn như vậy, nên chắc em về một đợt thôi
A: Regarding exam preparation, the schedule is ridiculous. After one exam, there's an 11-day break, then another exam and another 8-day break. There are 6 exams like that, so I'll probably only be able to come home for one visit.
B: Regarding returning for exam prep, the schedule is quite funny; after finishing one subject, there's an 11-day break, then after the next subject, another 8-day break, and it's like that for 6 subjects, so I'll probably just go back once.
C: About exam preparation, sister. The schedule is so ridiculous. Take one exam, then have 11 days off, then take another exam, then have another 8 days off. And there are 6 subjects like that, so I'll probably just go home for one trip.

standard: Mua con này đi ngoại, chứ đợi tới năm Tân Mùi nhỉ?
A: Buy this one for overseas travel, instead of waiting until the Year of the Goat, right?
B: Buy this one, Grandma, or are we waiting until the year of the Goat?
C: Buy this one and go abroad, or else we'll have to wait until the year Tân Mùi, right?

standard: Vừa đấm vừa xoa mà đấm kiểu này xoa không nổi

B: Giving and taking, but when the blow is this hard, the soothing doesn't help.
C: Punching this hard, you can't even rub it better

standard: Em khiếp luôn! Đang đi phơi phới đi nữa. Nó ào cho cái.
A: I was terrified! I was just walking along happily, and then it suddenly attacked me.
B: I'm terrified! I was walking along happily. Then it just suddenly poured down.
C: I'm scared to death! I was walking along happily, and then something suddenly rushed at me.

standard: Mà toàn già rồi chứ phải trẻ đâu?

B: But they're all old, not young?
C: And they're all old already, not young at all?

standard: Đâu núi, đâu non, đâu chẳng thấy.

B: Where are the mountains, where are the hills, I see none.

B: I'll send you to take some photos for me to see.

C: It would be awesome to come back someday and have a match!

B: That probably depends on you, doesn't it?

C: My older sister came all the way from Vinh to cook porridge for me, [she's] worried [I might] get a fever tonight and all, but normally we don't talk to each other at all.

B: These dishes are very chewy; eating them makes my teeth ache.
C: These are so chewy, they hurt my teeth.

B: Just stand in front of the bar and watch them go in and out; going into places like this is just a waste of money.
C: I just stand outside the bar watching people come and go, no point going in these places, it's a waste of money

B: Admin should post these kinds of posts; our people should be like this.

standard: đoạn nào thế nhỉ?

B: I keep passing by here.
C: I've been passing by all this time, em

standard: Cháy như thế còn gì là con chuột nữa bạn ơi, ăn ung thư chết đó.
A: With all that burning, there's nothing left of the rat, my friend; eating it will give you cancer and kill you.
B: It's burnt to that extent, it's not even a mouse anymore; you'll get cancer and die.
C: It's so burnt it's not even a mouse anymore, my friend, you're eating cancer and will die from it.

standard: Cái này ăn nóng, chứ mang về kiểu gì.
A: This is best eaten hot; you can't take it home.
B: This should be eaten hot; there's no way to take it home.
C: This should be eaten hot, there's no point taking it to-go.

standard: Sao biết ngon. Tưởng vậy là dễ thương đỏ?
A: How do you know it's delicious? Did you think it was cute and red?
B: How do you know it's delicious? You thought that was cute, huh?
C: How did you know it's good? I thought it was just cute and red?

standard: Chợ Do làm gì có đê.
A: The Do Market doesn't have a dike.
B: There is no dike at Do Market.
C: Why would there be a dyke at Chợ Đỗ?

standard: Nhà giàu mới có cơm, chứ nhà mình nghèo toàn độn ngô, sắn, khoai thôi.
A: Only rich people had rice; our family was poor and we only ever mixed it with corn, cassava, and sweet potatoes.
B: Only rich families have rice; my family is poor, so we always mix it with corn, cassava, and potatoes.
C: Rich families get to eat rice, but my family is so poor we only have corn, cassava, and sweet potato.

standard: Vậy sao em trai, sao không gặp được nhau để tâm sự vậy
A: So, little brother, why can't we meet up to talk?
B: Why is that, little brother? Why can't we meet to talk and share things?
C: So why, little bro, can't we meet up to talk?

standard: ai 2 lon ghé ngang rẽ vào rẽ vào nào
A: Anyone with 2 cans passing by, turn in, turn in!
B: Anyone with two cans, stop by and turn in, turn in!
C: Anyone want to hang out, just drop by!

standard: Có gì trong đó không để bạn vô thành phố chơi.
A: Is there anything in there that would allow you to go into the city to play?
B: Is there anything in there so that I can come to the city to hang out?
C: Is there anything in there for you to come to the city to hang out?

standard: Có thật không để đi kể.
A: Is it really true that I should go and tell the story?
B: Is it true? I'm going to go tell people.
C: Is it true? Should we go tell [them]?

standard: Một trong những tỉnh giàu có của miền Bắc.
A: One of the wealthiest provinces in northern Vietnam.
B: One of the wealthy provinces in the North.
C: One of the wealthy provinces of the North.

standard: Có thật không vậy trời. Hiện tượng , hay ảo tưởng vậy không biết
A: Is that really true? Is it a phenomenon or an illusion? I don't know.
B: Is this for real? I don't know if it's a phenomenon or just a delusion.
C: Is this for real? Is it a phenomenon or just an illusion? I don't know.

standard: sau này có người yêu đừng bảo người yêu mua nhé
A: Later, when you have a boyfriend/girlfriend, don't ask them to buy it for you!
B: In the future, when you have a partner, don't ask them to buy it.
C: In the future, when you have a partner, don't tell your partner to buy things, okay?

standard: Vậy sao không rủ bạn đi?
A: So why not invite a friend?
B: Then why didn't you invite your friend?
C: Then why don't you invite your friend to come along?

standard: Ram bánh ướt xôi giò ăn sáng ở bà Liễu bán ngon lắm ạ. Mọi người qua ủng hộ.
A: The steamed rice rolls with pork sausage and sticky rice for breakfast at Mrs. Lieu's shop are delicious. Everyone should go and support her.
B: The fried steamed rice rolls, sticky rice, and pork sausage for breakfast sold by Mrs. Lieu are very delicious. Everyone, please come and support her.
C: Ram (steamed rice rolls, sticky rice, and Vietnamese sausage) for breakfast at Ba Lieu's is really delicious. Everyone should come support.

standard: Để sau đi, bữa nay ở nhà có gì vui không nhỉ?
A: Let's talk about that later. Is there anything fun happening at home today?
B: Let's do it later; is there anything fun happening at home today?
C: Let's put it aside for now, I wonder what's fun at home today.

standard: Trời này mà tắm khe thì chết rét, lên nhặt hạt dẻ hôm nay đang mùa.
A: Bathing in the stream in this weather would be freezing; it's better to go pick chestnuts today, as they're in season.
B: Bathing in the stream in this weather would be freezing to death; let's go pick chestnuts since it's the season today.
C: With weather like this, taking a bath in the stream would kill me from the cold. I'll go pick chestnuts since it's the season now.

standard: Cái miệng làm hại cái thân.
A: The mouth can get you into trouble.
B: The mouth brings harm to the body.
C: The mouth brings harm upon the body.

standard: ngon quá này! hẹn Tết về quê nhé.
A: This is delicious! Let's meet up for Tet (Vietnamese New Year) when we get back home.
B: This looks so delicious! Let's meet up back in our hometown during Tet.
C: This is so delicious! Let's make a promise to go back to our hometown for Tết.

standard: sau này không có video xem là tại chúng mày
A: If there are no videos to watch later, it's your fault.
B: If there are no videos to watch in the future, it's because of you guys.
C: In the future, if there are no videos to watch, it's because of you guys

standard: Màu mè. Được vài bữa bỏ nhau bây giờ đó
A: Flashy. They break up after a few days.
B: Flashy. You'll probably break up in a few days.
C: Being flashy. You left me after just a few days

standard: trúng thật nhé trời, hôm trước mới trúng 20 nghìn đây
A: Wow, I really did win! I just won 20,000 the other day.
B: I actually won, oh my god, I just won 20 thousand the other day.
C: I really won, oh my god, I just won 20 thousand the other day.

standard: Mới gió chứ chưa thấy mưa mự ạ, Vẫn đang lì lắm, chưa biết sợ.
A: It's just windy, no rain yet, sir. They're still very stubborn, not showing any fear.
B: It's only windy, no rain yet. Still being very stubborn, doesn't know fear yet.
C: Just the wind, no rain yet. Still holding out strong, doesn't know fear.

standard: Về quê quét sân cho mẹ một bữa , thì đúng bữa gió to
A: I went back to my hometown to sweep the yard for my mother, and it happened to be a very windy day.
B: I went back to my hometown to sweep the yard for my mother for a bit, and it happened to be exactly when the wind was strong.
C: I went back to my hometown to sweep the yard for my mom for a bit, and right then there was a strong wind.

standard: ăn thua gì nửa bánh xe rồi kia nhỉ.
A: That's nothing compared to half a wheel already!
B: What's the point, since it's already half a wheel's length ahead.
C: What's the point of half a wheel over there anyway.
